confidence.describe: {{n}} out of 10 scenarios meet the goal

reach_sooner.label: Reach sooner
reach_sooner.blurb: Aim for the earliest date. Less certain, but you get there faster.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.blurb: A sensible middle ground between speed and certainty.

play_it_safe.label: Play it safe
play_it_safe.blurb: Aim for high certainty. The plan may take a little longer.

proportional.title: Steady & even
proportional.subtitle: A stable, even monthly split across your accounts.

conservative.title: Conservative
conservative.subtitle: Smaller ups and downs, slower growth.

balanced.title: Balanced
balanced.subtitle: A steady blend of growth and stability.
